evals.prompt: Convert this Outlook message (attached as meeting.msg) into a Markdown file preserving Subject, From, To, Date, Message-ID, and extract attachments.
evals.expected_output: A Markdown file with YAML frontmatter containing the metadata and a markdown body. Attachments saved under attachments/ and referenced in frontmatter.

evals.prompt: Save this marketing email (campaign.msg) as Markdown. Prefer the HTML body converted to Markdown, and include inline images as extracted attachments.
evals.expected_output: Markdown with converted HTML body and extracted images listed in attachments.
